title: claytonia caffra
intro: Claytonia caffra, also known as the mountain glasswort or harpu, is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Portulacaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Claytonia caffra include the ability to treat digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and provide antioxidant properties that can help to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
